match.userMessage:
A cinematic establishing shot for "Untitled Sequence". Opening scene: Scene 1 — 5s
Sunlight slices across the white vanity in the Bondi studio. Scarlett’s sun-kissed hand reaches in, lifts the small coral box, and flips open the lid with a soft snap.

Scene 2 — 5s
Fingers slide the lipstick tube free. She twists the base once; the vivid coral bullet rises, catching the direct window light against the pale marble surface.

Scene 3 — 5s
Scarlett stands, steps to the open window, and swipes the color across her lips in one quick motion while the ocean breeze already Art style: Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save. Mood: Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool. Lighting: Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Warm late-afternoon glow for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast. No text, no titles, no subtitles, no watermarks, no letters, no words, no signs, no UI elements.
